name: @torqlab/claude
description: This repository contains a project-level Claude collection: skills, hooks, and other useful things for the agentic development.

validate-branch-name.errorMsg:
Branch name must follow pattern: <type>/<ticket_id>-<description>

Examples:
  feat/123-add-feature
  fix/42-resolve-bug
  chore/99-update-deps

Allowed types: feat, fix, chore, docs, test, refactor, perf
Ticket ID must be numeric (required).

See: .claude/skills/semantic-release/SKILL.md for details
